performance.input: I want a skill that helps developers write better commit messages. It should be smart about the project style.
performance.assertion: The response must replace 'smart about the project style' with concrete, actionable logic (e.g., specific rules or a verify loop) and explicitly ask the user for confirmation of this translation.

performance.input: Finalize the design for the 'Commit Message' skill we just discussed. Provide the full SKILL.md content.
performance.assertion: The response must contain all five mandatory sections: Frontmatter, When to Use, When Not to Use, Workflow, and Validation.

performance.input: Design a skill to automate dependency updates.
performance.assertion: The response must provide the design in the chat and must not call any file-writing tools (write, edit, or bash commands for file creation).

trigger.description: Positive Trigger: High-level goal for a new skill
trigger.input: Help me architect a new skill for analyzing .NET performance.

trigger.description: Negative Trigger: Trivial change to existing skill
trigger.input: Can you fix a typo in skill-architect/SKILL.md?
